series_metadata.series_title: Operator Certification Renewal Cards and Related Information
series_metadata.series_description: Information pertaining to Ohio Administrative Code 3745-7-15, including renewal applications sent to all certified operators, contact hour course applications, and requests to be an approved training provider.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain renewal applications in office for 4 years (two renewal cycles.) Retain contact hour course applications as long as the course is approved, then destroy when course expires. Requests to be approved training providers should be maintained in office while training provider is approved, then destroyed when provider goes out of business or stops providing courses., Paper: Recycle
